title: ivl: logic_lpm.c:463: emit_nexus_port_signal: Assertion `! sig' failed.

features.name: single wire connected to multiple named ports of one module instance
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation where the exact same wire is passed to two or more distinct named input ports of the same instance using named-port connection syntax

features.name: two-level hierarchy propagation of shared wire through multiple input ports
features.description: Code should include two levels of module hierarchy where a single wire is mapped to multiple named input ports at the top level, and those ports are individually forwarded as separate named connections to a deeper sub-module instance
